sample_funnel.note_on_extrapolation: The 30-item sample is a SAMPLE of the 170 determinacy-passing pool, not validated in full. Rates below are sample-level eligibility findings, not rescaled population claims (170 or 422 denominators).

sufficiency_pool_main_minus_floor_leak.definition: single-session-user + single-session-assistant main pool (n=20) MINUS 28bcfaac (reclassified as floor-leak / world-knowledge-solvable, not a memory item)
sufficiency_pool_main_minus_floor_leak.note: C_full == C_oracle on this pool: NULL contrast for span-narrowing (cannot show narrowing to minimal span helps over full session for this model/pool).

floor_leak_items_excluded_from_sufficien.reason: C_noev correct (gold answer reproduced with zero context) -- plausibly general/world knowledge (musictheory.net is a well-known free resource), not evidence use. Left in the pool this would inflate floor and ceiling alike.

preference_exploratory_pool.note: C_full < C_oracle here (live contrast, opposite of main pool): full-session context lets the model drift into plausible but evidence-unsupported elaboration. One item (38146c39) fails all three conditions -- the gold target is a meta preference-summary, not a literal answer to the question asked, so even oracle-span grounding does not make the auditor reproduce that framing.

source_level_review.c14c00dd_caveat: Evidence states the shampoo was bought at Trader Joe's; question asks for the brand. Mild store->brand inference. Kept in n=19, dropped in n=18 sensitivity.
source_level_review.c_full_leniency_note: c14c00dd C_full candidate ("lavender scented shampoo") omits Trader Joe's yet judged correct -> at least one C_full pass is partial-answer judge leniency. C_full=C_oracle is a null/diagnostic contrast only; robust contrast is C_noev vs C_oracle.
source_level_review.preference_oracle_rows: WEAK_PASS_SOURCE_LEVEL (07b6f563, a89d7624); exploratory only, not in main headline
source_level_review.floor_leak_28bcfaac: PASS_FOR_EXCLUSION_SOURCE_LEVEL; world-knowledge resource, kept out of headline
